data.text: fable-1 (scout): sprint due east along row y=0 from (0,0) to cp-beacon (12,0) — 12 tiles, ~4 turns at move-3. On arrival, issue HOLD every turn and do not move: 2 consecutive turns captures it, 4 more completes ms-beacon (6 hold turns total, done ~turn10). If a house unit is already there or arrives alongside you, occupancy isn't sole — hold anyway and wait them out, don't abandon the point.

fable-2 (harvester): head to rn-lowland (5,5) — 9 tiles, ~5 turns at move-2. Then loop: gather (fills you to 3) -> move 2 tiles to deliver point (6,6) -> deliver. Repeat this gather/move/deliver cycle for the rest of the match; this is our main feed for ms-caravan's 10 resources.

fable-3 (defender): travel with fable-2 to rn-lowland (5,5), same 9-tile trip. Gather once, deliver once to (6,6) — that single delivery is the margin that gets us over 10 total, since fable-2 alone falls just short by turn 16. After that delivery, push 2 tiles to cp-relay (7,5) and hold it — it's right next to our gathering hub, cheap insurance against house grabbing it for free.
Moving east along y=0 toward cp-beacon (12,0), now at (3,0). Will keep reporting fog as I reveal it.
En route to rn-lowland (5,5), now at (2,1), ETA ~4 more turns.
Moving toward rn-lowland (5,5) via (2,1), tracking with fable-2's route. Will gather once, deliver to (6,6), then push to cp-relay (7,5) per plan.
greedy split: harvester runs node-to-target relay; scout takes the far point, defender the near one

SPLIT STRATEGY — two independent threads, no unit waits on another. fable-1 (scout): go straight to cp-beacon (12,0) along the y=0 edge — pure x-travel, ~3 turns. On arrival, HOLD every turn without moving: 2 consecutive turns captures it, then 4 more consecutive turns (6 total) completes ms-beacon (reward 8). If a house unit shows up there too, still hold — don't retreat, sole occupancy is what counts and you have the shorter path in. fable-2 (harvester) + fable-3 (defender): move together to rn-lowland (5,5) — it's only 2 tiles from the deliver point (6,6), the closest node to ms-caravan. Cycle: gather (fills to carry cap) -> move to (6,6) -> deliver -> move back -> repeat. Node has exactly 12 remaining: harvester's 3 full loads (9) plus defender's loads (3) clears the 10 needed for ms-caravan (reward 10) by roughly turn 15. Don't detour for cp-relay or cp-well — we don't have spare units, stay on mission. If house units block your node or delivery tile, path around them rather than waiting.
Moving to (6,0), on pace for cp-beacon (12,0) in ~2 more turns. Will hold there once I arrive.

Ack split plan, moving toward rn-lowland (5,5) with fable-3, diagonal step this turn to (3,2). Heads up: my state doesn't show ms-caravan or a deliver point at (6,6) yet (missions list only has ms-beacon so far) -- will confirm exact deliver tile/mission amount once we get vision on it, may need a course correction then.

fable-3: en route to rn-lowland with fable-2, agreed. Note: ms-caravan / deliver@(6,6) isn't in my visible missions yet (fog) - only ms-beacon confirmed so far, cp-relay (7,5) is the only relay point I can see. Will flag once we spot the real deliver tile/mission id near there.

fable-1 (scout): break off solo — head straight for cp-beacon (12,0), ~2 turns of movement (distance 6, move 3). On arrival, hold there continuously: 2 turns to capture the point, then 4 more consecutive turns to complete ms-beacon (amount 4 = 2+4 = 6 turns total holding, uninterrupted). Do not detour for resources or fights. If a house unit contests sole occupancy, stay put and keep holding rather than repositioning — losing the streak resets the count.

fable-2 (harvester): move to rn-lowland (5,5) (distance 5, ~3 turns), gather to full (3), then move to the delivery square (6,6) (distance 2, 1 turn) and deliver. Loop gather-deliver continuously afterward. fable-3 is running the same loop in parallel on the same node — don't wait for them, just keep cycling independently. This mission (ms-caravan, needs 10) should close by roughly turn 10 with both of you working it.

fable-3 (defender): pair with fable-2 on the same gather/deliver loop — rn-lowland (5,5) to gather to full (2), then deliver at (6,6), repeat. Running in parallel with fable-2 splits the 10-resource ms-caravan mission roughly 3-and-2 per cycle so it closes faster than either of you alone could manage solo within the turn limit. If a house unit tries to plant sole occupancy on cp-relay (7,5) nearby, break off briefly to contest it, but resume the gather loop once clear — the caravan delivery is the priority.
Moving to (9,0) this turn, then (12,0) next turn to start the beacon hold. On track for 2-turn approach as planned.
Moving toward rn-lowland (5,5), at (4,3) now — 3 more turns to arrive and start gathering.

Moving toward rn-lowland (5,5) to start the gather loop with fable-2. Note: I only see ms-beacon in my state, not ms-caravan yet — will proceed on your info, flag if that mission never resolves into view.

fable-1/u1 (scout): move now straight to cp-beacon [12,0] - you're exactly 3 tiles out, matches your move stat exactly. Once there, HOLD every remaining turn without moving: 2 consecutive turns captures it, keep holding to 6 total turns to finish ms-beacon. This is your only job - don't detour for resources or enemies, House's units are all in the southeast and shouldn't reach you.

fable-2/u2 (harvester): head to rn-lowland [5,5] (closer than highland, and away from House's harvester near [8,9]). Gather to full, then move to the deliver square [6,6] and deliver. Loop this (gather-deliver-gather-deliver) until ms-caravan (10) is done. u3 is running the same loop alongside you for extra throughput - solo you'll fall just short of 10 by the turn limit, so both of you gathering is what closes it.

fable-3/u3 (defender): same target as u2 - move to rn-lowland [5,5], gather (carry 1), deliver at [6,6], repeat in parallel with u2. Your extra hauling is the margin that gets ms-caravan to 10 in time. If a House unit shows up at the node or the deliver square instead, hold your ground to block them rather than continuing to gather.
Moving to cp-beacon [12,0] now, exactly 3 tiles. Will hold there every turn after to capture (2 turns) then complete ms-beacon (6 total). Will report if any House unit shows up near the beacon.
u2 moving toward rn-lowland, will be at [5,4] this turn then gather next turn at [5,5].

u3 en route to rn-lowland: [4,3]->[5,4] this turn (max move is 2, direct hop is 3 away), reaching [5,5] next turn to gather. Will loop gather/deliver at [6,6] alongside u2 for ms-caravan. Will hold ground instead of gathering if a House unit contests the node or deliver square.

u1(scout): keep holding cp-beacon(12,0) every turn, action=hold, do not move. You're at 1/6 toward ms-beacon capture+hold; 4 more consecutive holds finishes it (capture lands turn after next, mission complete ~turn 8). Highest priority: never break the hold.

u2(harvester): move to rn-lowland(5,5) this turn. Next turn gather (fills to 3). Then move to (6,6) and deliver. Repeat gather-move-deliver loop continuously until ms-caravan reaches 10 resources. Solo you only reach ~9 by turn 16, so u3 must run parallel loops too.

u3(defender): move to rn-lowland(5,5) alongside u2 this turn. Next turn gather (fills to 1). Then move to (6,6) and deliver, and repeat the same loop as u2 in parallel — your extra runs close the gap so ms-caravan finishes before turn 16. Skip cp-relay/cp-well for now; caravan+beacon are our only priorities this match.
Holding cp-beacon at (12,0), streak 1/4 toward mission complete ~turn 8. Will not move.
Moving to rn-lowland(5,5) now; will gather next turn then run the gather-move-deliver loop to (6,6) as instructed.
u3 moving to rn-lowland(5,5) now, will gather next turn then run the gather->(6,6) deliver loop in parallel with u2 to close the caravan gap.

fable-1: HOLD position at cp-beacon (action=hold, do not move). You're at streak 2/6 on the beacon hold mission (amount 4 needs 2+4=6 total turns) — 4 more consecutive turns locks reward 8. Any move resets this, so stay put no matter what you see.

fable-2: You're the primary caravan hauler for ms-caravan (deliver 10, currently 0). Cycle: gather at rn-lowland (fills to your carry-3), move to [6,6] (2 tiles, within your move-2), deliver, move back to rn-lowland, repeat. Minimize idle turns — every trip nets 3 toward the 10 target.

fable-3: Run the same gather-shuttle-deliver cycle as fable-2 in parallel from rn-lowland (carry-1 per trip) — two haulers moving simultaneously reaches the amount-10 caravan target far faster than one. Keep pace with fable-2's cycle. Once team resources hit 10 (mission complete) or if we're clearly ahead of the turn-16 deadline, break off toward cp-relay [7,5] to contest it — house's defender is one tile away and may take it uncontested otherwise, but do not divert until the caravan delivery is secured.
Holding at cp-beacon, streak 2/6 toward ms-beacon (4 more turns to lock reward 8). Not moving.
Gathering at rn-lowland now (fills to carry-3), then moving to [6,6] to deliver next turn. Will keep cycling gather->move->deliver->move back.
At rn-lowland [5,5], gathering now (carry-1). Will shuttle to deliver point after fable-2, keeping pace on ms-caravan. Will hold off on cp-relay until caravan hits 10 or we're ahead of schedule.

fable-1 (scout): HOLD at cp-beacon (12,0) every remaining turn — do not move for any reason. We're deep into the hold streak (3 turns logged) and ms-beacon (reward 8) completes soon; breaking now throws away the progress. Stay locked down until the mission shows complete.

fable-2 (harvester, full at 3/3): move now to the deliver point (6,6) — it's Manhattan distance 2 from (5,5), one move gets you there. Next turn, deliver. Then loop: move back to rn-lowland (5,5), gather to full, move to (6,6), deliver — repeat that shuttle until ms-caravan hits 10 delivered. Plenty of resource left at rn-lowland (8 remaining), no need to switch nodes.

fable-3 (defender, full at 1/1): move now to (6,6) alongside fable-2 and deliver next turn. After that, keep shuttling rn-lowland to (6,6) same as fable-2 — every point delivered matters, we need both of you cycling to hit 10 before turn 16. Watch (7,5): a house unit is sitting on cp-relay building a capture streak. If you see a house unit approaching our deliver point at (6,6) to interfere, break off and screen it — otherwise stay on the resource loop.
Holding at cp-beacon (12,0), staying locked down until ms-beacon completes. No house units in my vision (radius 4) threatening the beacon.
Moving to (6,6) now, full at 3/3. Will deliver next turn, then shuttle back to rn-lowland (5,5) and repeat until ms-caravan hits 10.
Moving to (6,6) to deliver next turn per plan. House defender still parked at cp-relay (7,5), not near our deliver point yet — will screen if it turns toward (6,6).
fable-u1: HOLD at cp-beacon this turn and next turn — do not move. You're at streak 4/6; two more consecutive holds completes ms-beacon (reward 8).

fable-u2: DELIVER now at (6,6) to bank your 3 carried resources toward ms-caravan (needs 10 total, we're at 0). Then move to rn-highland (8,6) — 2 tiles, one move — gather to full, return to (6,6), deliver. Repeat this cycle until the mission completes.

fable-u3: DELIVER now at (6,6) to bank your 1 carried resource. Then move to rn-lowland (5,5) — 2 tiles, one move — gather to full, return to (6,6), deliver. Repeat in parallel with fable-u2 on the other node; ignore house-u2 contesting the tile, just keep cycling.
Holding at cp-beacon, streak building toward ms-beacon completion. Will hold again next turn as instructed.
Delivered 3 at (6,6). Moving to rn-highland (8,6) next to refill, then back to deliver — cycling as planned.
Delivering my 1 at (6,6) now. Next turn heading to rn-lowland (5,5) to gather, then back to deliver — cycling in parallel with fable-u2.
delivered 3

fable-u1 (scout, cp-beacon): HOLD this turn. Your streak is 5 — one more consecutive hold completes ms-beacon (reward 8). After it completes, keep holding cp-beacon; nearest House unit is 8+ tiles away and can't contest sole occupancy while you're there. Do not move.

fable-u2 (harvester, at deliver point 6,6): Move to rn-highland (8,6) — distance 2, one move gets you there. Next turn: gather (fills carry to 3). Then move back to (6,6) (distance 2) and deliver. We need 6 more resources for ms-caravan (currently 4/10, need 10). After first delivery, if total is still short, repeat the highland loop — a second load of 3 will clear it. House's harvester is parked on the same square and may race you to the nodes; move first.

fable-u3 (defender, at deliver point 6,6): Move to rn-lowland (5,5) — distance 2, one move. Next turn: gather (carry 1). Then move back to (6,6) and deliver. Working lowland while fable-u2 works highland in parallel gets ms-caravan's remaining 6 resources faster than one unit alone. After delivering, loop back to lowland again if the mission isn't yet complete.
Holding cp-beacon, streak 5->6, ms-beacon should complete this turn. Staying put after.
Moving to rn-highland (8,6) now; will gather next turn then return to (6,6) to deliver.
Moving to rn-lowland (5,5) now, will gather next turn then deliver to (6,6). Watching for House defender at (7,5) but they are out of my path.

Beacon's locked in (8/8) — full pivot to Caravan (4/10, 7 turns left). fable-2 (harvester, at rn-highland 8,6): gather now, then run the loop move(6,6)->deliver, back to node, gather, move, deliver — two full round trips nets +6 and finishes it around turn 15. fable-3 (defender, at rn-lowland 5,5): gather now, move to (6,6), deliver your load — that extra +1 is our safety margin if house contests the node. fable-1 (scout): beacon's done, no value holding that tile — head toward (8,6)/rn-highland at full speed to backstop the harvester; if you can't close the distance by ~turn 13, reroute straight to the (6,6) drop point instead. House's own caravan math tops out near 9/10 unless their defender abandons cp-relay to help gather, so we have the tempo advantage — don't hold back, run every gather-deliver cycle you can before turn 16.
Copy, beacon released. Burning full move toward rn-highland (8,6) to backstop fable-2; now at (11,2), on pace to arrive ~turn 12-13. Will pivot to (6,6) drop point if the gap isn't closing by then.
At rn-highland (8,6) with house-u2 contesting the same tile — gathering now per plan, will move to (6,6) to deliver next turn.
At rn-lowland (5,5), gathering now per plan. Next: move to (6,6) and deliver.

fable-1 (scout): fall back to cp-beacon now - move to (12,0), exactly 3 tiles, one move covers it. Once there, hold every remaining turn. House's scout is 12 tiles off at (9,9) but could still dash for a late flip; your presence blocks sole occupancy. Ms-caravan is covered by fable-2/fable-3, so your job is guarding the beacon we already banked.

fable-2 (harvester): move to the deliver point (6,6) now, 2 tiles, in range. Next turn deliver your 3. Then loop back to (8,6), gather the last 3 off rn-highland (canonical order breaks ties in our favor vs house's harvester on the same square), return to (6,6), and deliver again - that second load pushes team resources past 10 and closes ms-caravan for +10.

fable-3 (defender): move to (6,6) now, 2 tiles. Next turn deliver your 1. Then loop back to (5,5), gather again from rn-lowland (uncontested, 7 remaining), return to (6,6), and deliver once more as insurance in case fable-2's highland run gets blocked. Don't try to flip cp-relay - house's defender sits 2 tiles from it and will contest sole occupancy; not worth the risk this late in the match.
Moving to cp-beacon (12,0) now, 3 tiles. Will hold every remaining turn to lock ms-beacon; house scout is far off at (9,9) but I'll stay put to block any late flip attempt.
Moving to deliver point (6,6) now, on track to unload 3 next turn then loop back to rn-highland.
Moving to (6,6) now to deliver my 1 next turn, then looping back to rn-lowland for a second load as insurance behind fable-2's highland run.
fable-u1 holds cp-beacon to complete ms-beacon (reward 8) while fable-u2/u3 run the gather-deliver loop at [6,6] to hit the resource threshold.

Deliver push: fable-u2 and fable-u3, you're both standing on the caravan square [6,6] with cargo (3 and 1) — deliver now, that lands us at 8/10. Beacon mission is already banked, no need to babysit it further for the win condition. Next: fable-u2 (harvester) move to rn-highland [8,6] (2 tiles, one move), gather next turn to fill 3, then return to [6,6] and deliver — that alone clears the 10 threshold with turns to spare. fable-u3 (defender) in parallel: move to rn-lowland [5,5] (2 tiles), gather 1, return to [6,6], deliver — redundant capacity as a safety margin in case anything blocks u2. Splitting nodes avoids us fighting over the same pile. fable-u1 (scout): hold position at cp-beacon [12,0] — you're too far (12 tiles) to help the caravan run in the turns left, so just maintain the point. No need to chase cp-well, it's unreachable in time. We're ahead of house on the caravan race (they're only at 6/10 even after their own delivery) — no blocking needed, just execute the gather-deliver loop clean.

Correction: ms-beacon shows status=open, completed_by=[] in state — it's NOT banked yet, still needs more hold turns (amount 4, i.e. 2+4=6 total). I'm staying on cp-beacon [12,0] to keep the streak alive; no house unit is within reach (nearest is 10 tiles out, well beyond their move+turns left), so this costs us nothing. Keep running the caravan gather/deliver loop — I'll hold the beacon to close out the reward-8 mission too.
Delivering 3 now from [6,6] as ordered. Will head to rn-highland [8,6] next turn to refill.
Delivering my 1 cargo now at [6,6] as directed — puts us at 8/10 with u2's gather-return loop still to come.
delivered 3

We're ahead: beacon hold banked (reward 8), caravan at 8/10 vs house's 6/10, and cp-relay sits open with no house unit on it. Harvester: move to rn-lowland (5,5) this turn (dist 2), gather next turn — 3 carry easily covers the last 2 we need — then return to (6,6) and deliver; caravan should close by turn 15. Defender: move onto cp-relay (7,5) this turn (dist 2, currently empty), then hold turn 13 to flip it from house to us, and keep holding after that to lock the capture in — we don't need your carry, harvester alone closes the gap. Scout: hold position at cp-beacon (12,0) — no house unit is anywhere near it, so staying costs nothing and protects the point we already completed. No one needs to race house for resources; we're clear on both mission and map control.
Holding cp-beacon (12,0) as planned — no house unit near, point stays locked while harvester closes the caravan and defender flips cp-relay.
Moving to rn-lowland (5,5) now, will gather next turn and return to (6,6) to deliver — closing the caravan gap as planned.
Moving onto cp-relay (7,5) now; confirmed empty this turn. Will hold starting turn 13 to flip it and lock the capture.
fable-2 gathers this turn at rn-lowland, moves to [6,6] next turn, delivers turn after to push ms-caravan to completion.

fable-2 (harvester): gather now at rn-lowland (you're standing on it, carry fills to 3). Next turn move to [6,6] (distance 2, exactly your move stat) then deliver the turn after. That lands us at 11/10 on ms-caravan and banks the reward before house's harvester can match it — don't wait, act this turn.

fable-3 (defender): hold your ground at cp-relay [7,5]. House's defender shares your square, so neither side can claim sole occupancy while you're there — staying denies them the capture. Don't chase the resource nodes, we don't need the extra gather; just deny.

fable-1 (scout): ms-beacon is already banked (turn 9), and cp-well is too far to reach in the turns left (22 tiles away). Best use of you now is holding cp-beacon so we don't hand control back — stay put, no need to move.
Holding cp-beacon at [12,0] to keep control and keep ms-beacon's hold streak alive since it still shows open — will flag if it flips to completed next turn.
Gathering now at rn-lowland (5,5), carry filling to 3. Will move to [6,6] next turn per plan, then deliver.
Holding at cp-relay [7,5], contesting alongside house-u3 — denying sole occupancy. Staying put, not chasing resources.

fable-u2 (harvester): move to (6,6) now — you're carrying 3 and team resources sit at 8, so reaching the caravan square lets you deliver next turn and push us to 11/10, completing ms-caravan. Do not gather again, just move this turn.
fable-u3 (defender): hold at cp-relay again this turn. You already have 1 consecutive hold turn logged — one more hold flips ownership to us and captures the point. Do not move.
fable-u1 (scout): stay put and hold at cp-beacon. It's already ours and no house unit can reach it before the match ends, so holding costs nothing and keeps it secure through the final turn.
Holding at cp-beacon as directed — secure, building toward ms-beacon hold amount.
Moving to (6,6) as directed, carrying 3, will deliver next turn.
Holding cp-relay again — second consecutive turn, capturing now. House defender at (9,5) is close enough to contest, watch for it.

fable-2: DELIVER now at (6,6) — you're carrying 3 and we have 8 banked, so delivering hits 11 >= 10 and completes ms-caravan (reward 10) immediately. Do not gather again, just deliver. fable-3: HOLD your square at cp-relay (7,5) — house's defender shares the tile with you, so neither side can capture solo; holding denies them the point for free, don't move off it. fable-1: HOLD at cp-beacon (12,0) — our hold mission there is already complete and we own it; house's scout is 9 tiles away and can't reach in time, so just sit tight and protect it.
Holding cp-beacon (12,0), mission complete and owned, no threat in range.
Delivering 3 now at (6,6) to complete ms-caravan.
Holding cp-relay (7,5) with house-u3 sharing the tile — denying the capture, staying put.
delivered 3
